dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - April 20, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**MLB Recap: Astros Homerun Barrage Leads to 9-2 Victory**

In a day filled with dominant performances, Isaac Paredes stole the show with two home runs and two RBIs, leading the Houston Astros to a 9-2 thrashing of the Cleveland Guardians. Paredes' power was matched by Max Muncy, who hit two home runs and scored two RBIs, helping the Los Angeles Dodgers crush the Colorado Rockies 12-3. On the pitching front, Dylan Cease threw a gem for the Toronto Blue Jays, striking out 12 in five innings to secure a 5-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels. Meanwhile, Seth Lugo pitched seven shutout innings for the Baltimore Orioles, but ultimately came up just short in a 7-5 loss to the Kansas City Royals.
